email-identification.title: Hey there! 👋
email-identification.subtitle: Enter your email to get started.

email.label: Email
email.hint: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

errors.pattern: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

terms.label: By continuing you agree to our

challenge-picker.title: How would you like to continue?

sms.title: SMS
sms.description: Get a text message on your phone

biometric-login-retry.title: Biometrics not recognized
biometric-login-retry.subtitle: You can try biometrics again or you can use your phone number to complete your authentication.

phone-registration.title: Let's verify your identity! 😊
phone-registration.subtitle: Enter your phone number to proceed.

phone.label: Phone number
phone.hint: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your phone number

errors.sandbox-pattern: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your phone number

resend-code.disabled: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to resend it...

success.title: Success
success.description: We sent you a new code.

error.title: Uh-oh!
error.description: There was an error while completing this request. Please contact the site admin.

confirm-and-authorize.title: Confirm & Authorize
confirm-and-authorize.subtitle: {{tenantName}} will be able to securely view the following data:

sync-data-error.title: An error occurred
sync-data-error.description: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.

onboarding-complete-error.title: An error occurred
onboarding-complete-error.description: An error occurred while completing onboarding. Please try again.

qr-register.title: Liveness check
qr-register.subtitle: We need to verify that you're a real person.
qr-register.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device and we'll use biometrics to verify it.

qr-code.instructions: Make sure the QR code is clearly visible on your device's screen. When authenticated, this page automatically updates.

sms.instructions: Alternatively, we can send you a link to your phone and you can continue from there.

new-tab-requested.title: New browser window
new-tab-requested.subtitle: To continue, we need to open a new browser window. Please tap the button below.

new-tab-processing.title: Liveness check pending
new-tab-processing.subtitle: We opened a new browser tab on this device. Please complete your liveness check in there.

qr-code-scanned.title: Liveness check
qr-code-scanned.subtitle: QR code scanned. Please continue on your phone.

qr-code-sent.title: Liveness check
qr-code-sent.subtitle: Link sent to phone. Please continue from there.

tenant-invalid.title: Integration incorrectly configured
tenant-invalid.subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this website.

verification-success.title: You're all set! 🎉
verification-success.description: Your identity has been successfully verified.

body.view-on-my-footprint: You can view your personal data and the companies that have access to it on
body.one-click: Next time, you can just sign in using Footprint with one-click!
